BlackHook
Table of Contents

Enum SizingType

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop
Assembly
BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Determines how an element is sized along a layout axis.

public enum SizingType : byte

Fields

Fit = 0

Sizes the element to exactly fit its content.

Fixed = 3

Sizes the element to a fixed pixel dimension.

Grow = 1

Allows the element to grow and fill remaining space in its parent container.

Percent = 2

Sizes the element as a percentage of its parent container's size.
